chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-503 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.2204/2023 (Exemption) 2. For order on Misc. No.2205/2023 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 12.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two and a half years ago. It was last taken up on 24.1.2023, which is over two and a half years ago when none was present for the petitioner without intimation. In the last two and a half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, once again, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
